pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target compatibility from version 1.8 to 11 to support the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and modern framework features.
Upgrade Hibernate from version 4 to 5 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 2.x and Java 11.
Switch Jackson Hibernate module from hibernate4 to hibernate5 to match the upgraded Hibernate version.
Switch from Ehcache 2.x (hibernate-ehcache) to JCache compliant Ehcache 3.x (hibernate-jcache).
Explicitly add javax.annotation-api dependency which was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Remove deprecated Spring Security OAuth 2.0 legacy dependency.
Add Spring Boot OAuth 2.0 Client starter for modern OAuth support.
Add Spring Boot OAuth 2.0 Resource Server starter for modern OAuth support.
Remove legacy Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin with Java 11 source/target and annotation processors.
Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 and modern dependencies.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed liquibase-hibernate4 to liquibase-hibernate5 and updated dependencies

package.json.general_idea: Replace the legacy Grunt-based build system and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, and angularjs deps; added @angular/core, @angular/cli, and webpack.

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing infrastructure with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma, jasmine-core; added jest, protractor, @angular-builders/jest.

package.json.general_idea: Rewrite npm scripts to use Angular CLI commands (ng build, ng serve) and Maven wrapper instead of Grunt tasks.
package.json.human_impl: Changed "test": "grunt test" to "test": "ng test..." and added webpack:prod scripts.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Switched from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool for better performance and compatibility with modern Spring Boot.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.type to com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource and removed dataSourceClassName.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Updated Hibernate dialect to support newer MySQL versions and removed deprecated naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed explicit database-platform and naming-strategy, relying on auto-detection or newer defaults.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replaced deprecated EhCache 2.x region factory with standard Spring Cache abstraction compatible with JDK 11.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed hibernate.cache.region.factory_class and moved cache config to jhipster.cache.ehcache.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replaced legacy Dropwizard metrics with Micrometer for JDK 11 compatibility and modern monitoring.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed metrics.spark/graphite config and added management.metrics.export.prometheus.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint configuration.
Update async task execution configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task.execution` namespace.
Replace legacy custom OAuth2 configuration with Spring Security 5.x OAuth2 Client properties.
